_comment: ccc-agent runtime config. Install (root-owned, world-readable) at /etc/ccc-agent/config.json or /opt/ccc-agent/config/config.json. The agent must never be able to write this file or anything under state_dir.
_confinement_comment: bwrap = real rootless sandbox (default). none = debug only, NOT a boundary.
_runtime_comment: The agent binary + deps live under the real $HOME / storage that the view hides; re-expose them read-only here. Prefer dests OUTSIDE the views (e.g. install agents at /opt) to avoid bwrap mkdir'ing mountpoints into the FUSE view. 'src' or 'src:dest'.
_cred_comment: Mount the agent's config/state dirs read-only from the real home so it finds them, but MASK the secret files (overmounted with /dev/null) and pass the real credential via ENV (read from the host auth file; the auth file never enters the sandbox). cred_env value: {file, json_key:'a.b.c'} to read a dotted key from a JSON auth file, or {env:'NAME'} to pass through, or a literal string.
